task_name: Workspace picker, switcher, invites, and create flow UI

strengths: All 6 DELIVERABLE scenarios trace to code: blocking invite modal with Accept/Decline/Remind me later (Sidebar.tsx:375-443), invite popover via SignOutPopover/PopoverShell pattern (Sidebar.tsx:335-353), cap disabling for accept and create plus server 409 fallback (workspaceSwitcher.ts:70-78, BoardContext.tsx:218-233, 264-288), unsaved-edit confirm dialog with Cancel/Switch (Sidebar.tsx:306-333), edits discarded on confirm (BoardContext.tsx:179-190), and 'Workspace created.' toast (workspaceSwitcher.ts:96, BoardContext.tsx:276-278).
Unsaved-edit state cleanly sourced from ContextPanel dirty tracking and exposed through context (ContextPanel.tsx:72-77, BoardContext.tsx:112), avoiding fragile prop drilling.
Pure helper logic isolated and unit-tested in workspaceSwitcher.ts; 14 tests pass; lint clean; commit message matches conventional format.

Design tokens match spec/creative-brief: dropdown rounded-md with active bg-primary-100 text-primary-800 (Sidebar.tsx:264-279), Ghost create action, picker/modals rounded-lg + border-neutral-200 + shadow-lg, avatar h-6 w-6, active workspace text-primary-900 in both desktop sidebar and mobile drawer.
Must-not-haves confirmed absent via grep: no Cmd+K/search/recent/pinned, no email/link invite handling, no multi-tab sync.

issues.description: The switch-confirm block in WorkspaceOverlays is effectively unreachable: it requires activeWorkspaceId === null, but confirm-required only arises from hasUnsavedCardEdits, which requires a loaded board (non-null activeWorkspaceId). The reachable confirm path at Sidebar.tsx:306-333 already covers every spec'd scenario, so this is harmless mis-gated dead code, not a behavior gap.
